_comment: Monitor background variants. A random entry is picked per render. Calibrate coordinates with: python3 calibrate_monitor.py <bg_path>. Paths are relative to project root. Set rect to [x, y, w, h] or quad to [[x0,y0],[x1,y1],[x2,y2],[x3,y3]] in TL,TR,BL,BR order. quad takes priority over rect.
